name: SAM Database Access - Registry Hive Credential Extraction
description: Detects SAM database credential extraction via registry save operations or Volume Shadow Copy access. Covers reg.exe, esentutl.exe, vssadmin, and Impacket secretsdump.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name == "reg.exe" and process.args : "save" and process.args : ("sam", "system", "security")) or (process.name == "esentutl.exe" and process.args : ("sam", "ntds")) or (process.name : ("vssadmin.exe", "wmic.exe") and process.args : "*shadow*"))
